commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Bumps the `plugins/nemoclaw` git submodule from `faa0b8e` to `0578c72`, pulling in a 53-commit upstream NemoClaw update.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows the PR changes only the submodule gitlink while current generated reports still reference the old NemoClaw commit. No runtime bug reproduction is applicable for this dependency bump.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A repair lane can update this PR by regenerating README/reports for the new NemoClaw pin and running the existing static/report checks; no product decision is needed.

target.title: chore(deps): bump plugins/nemoclaw from `faa0b8e` to `0578c72`
target.body:
[//]: # (dependabot-start) ⚠️ **Dependabot is rebasing this PR** ⚠️ Rebasing might not happen immediately, so don't worry if this takes some time. Note: if you make any changes to this PR yourself, they will take precedence over the rebase. --- [//]: # (dependabot-end) Bumps [plugins/nemoclaw](https://github.com/NVIDIA/NemoClaw) from `faa0b8e` to `0578c72`.
Commits
  • 0578c72 fix(installer): default public installs to lkg (#4613)
  • 9248f5e fix(cli): probe live sandbox agent versions (#4550)
  • 09e4878 feat(messaging): rebuild new manifest-style messaging architecture (#4050)
  • df7d054 fix(whatsapp): force version-pinned OpenClaw messaging plugin installs (#4591)
  • d5b6670 fix(e2e): unset OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT and TOKEN in devices approve guard (#4573)
  • 4e89db9 docs: remove alpha software references (#4590)
  • 9641ce0 fix(onboard): register discord plugin entry when Discord channel is configure...
  • a25b393 fix(inference): preflight NEMOCLAW_VLLM_MODEL on sandbox connect (#4567)
  • be0f1d8 feat(cli): add sandbox skill remove command (#4563)
  • 7da4960 fix(inference): redirect bare inference set to openshell (#4566)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
